provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models an ambiguous-tool-choice case where conservative non-repair is correct.

request_tools.name: move_file
request_tools.description: Move a file from a source path to a destination path, removing the original.

request_tools.name: copy_file
request_tools.description: Copy a file from a source path to a destination path, leaving the original in place.

raw_output: Sure, I'll relocate report.pdf into the archive/ folder for you now.
note: "Relocate" fits both move_file and copy_file equally and the output never commits to keeping or removing the original, so choosing either tool would be a guess; no_tool is the correct conservative label.
